Implement this feature in the smallest safe vertical slice.

Rules:
1. Start with domain types if needed.
2. Then implement pure engine logic.
3. Add or update tests.
4. Then connect UI.
5. Keep code simple and readable.
6. Do not introduce backend code unless explicitly required.
7. Do not mix scheduling logic into React components.

Before writing code:
- briefly identify the domain types affected
- identify the engine functions affected
- identify test cases needed

Then implement.
